title: Content planner - create campaign from chat
description: Input for the create-from-chat import: one campaign and its posts. Extra keys (id, slug, status, created_by, server-computed dates) are ignored. Every imported post starts in 'drafting'.

event_date.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD). When set, posts may use anchor_offset_days to schedule relative to it.

source_url.description: Link to the planning chat or doc.

hashtags.description: Default hashtags for this campaign's social posts, space- or comma-separated, e.g. '#PyLadiesCon #Python'.

scheduled_at.description: ISO datetime. Used when the post is not event-anchored. A naive value assumes the board timezone. null = unscheduled.

anchor_offset_days.description: Days from the campaign's event_date (negative = before). Honored only when event_date is set.

is_all_day.description: Defaults to true for blog/newsletter, else false.

expected_asset.description: Assets this post expects, one per line.

hashtags.description: Extra hashtags for this post, added to the campaign's. Used on social channels.
